---
title: "Benchmark gallery"
---

Compression results across 11 IBL Neuropixels (NP1) recordings spanning a range of brain
regions and recording quality.  Each recording was compressed with two parameter sets:

| Label | ε | α | Typical CR |
|---|---|---|---|
| **default** | 150 | 28 | ~350× |
| **aggressive** | 450 | 96 | ~750× |

Click any figure to open it full-size with keyboard navigation.

---

## Aggregate metrics

RMSE distribution (bar = median, ▽ = p95) and compression ratio across all recordings.

![Aggregate RMSE and compression ratio across all 11 PIDs](../figures/gallery/2026-06-15_lfp_compression_aggregate.png){.lightbox}

---

## Voltage density

Columns within each panel: original → Cadzow → default → aggressive (top row), with
residuals vs the previous stage (bottom row).

![`1a276285`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_1a276285-8b0e-4cc9-9f0a-a3a002978724.png){group="density" .lightbox}

![`1e104bf4`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_1e104bf4-7a24-4624-a5b2-c2c8289c0de7.png){group="density" .lightbox}

![`6638cfb3`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_6638cfb3-3831-4fc2-9327-194b76cf22e1.png){group="density" .lightbox}

![`749cb2b7`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_749cb2b7-e57e-4453-a794-f6230e4d0226.png){group="density" .lightbox}

![`d7ec0892`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_d7ec0892-0a6c-4f4f-9d8f-72083692af5c.png){group="density" .lightbox}

![`da8dfec1`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_da8dfec1-d265-44e8-84ce-6ae9c109b8bd.png){group="density" .lightbox}

![`dab512bd`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_dab512bd-a02d-4c1f-8dbc-9155a163efc0.png){group="density" .lightbox}

![`dc7e9403`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_dc7e9403-19f7-409f-9240-05ee57cb7aea.png){group="density" .lightbox}

![`e8f9fba4`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_e8f9fba4-d151-4b00-bee7-447f0f3e752c.png){group="density" .lightbox}

![`eebcaf65`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_eebcaf65-7fa4-4118-869d-a084e84530e2.png){group="density" .lightbox}

![`fe380793`](../figures/gallery/2026-06-02_lfp_density_voltage_fe380793-8035-414e-b000-09bfe5ece92a.png){group="density" .lightbox}
